_comment2: Import via: datadog-monitors.sh or Datadog UI → Monitors → New Monitor → Import
name: [Security] Brute Force Detection
message:
## Brute Force Attack Detected

**Alert 1** — Chapter 2.10.6

5 or more failed login attempts from the same IP in the last 15 minutes.

**IP Address:** {{@ip.name}}
**Count:** {{value}} failed attempts

### Immediate Actions
1. Review the attempts: [Log Explorer](https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%40event%3Aauth.login.failure%20%40ip%3A{{@ip.name}})
2. Consider blocking the IP at your WAF or load balancer
3. Check if any attempts succeeded: filter for `auth.login.success` from the same IP

{{#is_alert}}@{{ALERT_EMAIL}}{{/is_alert}}

options.escalation_message: Brute force alert still active after 1 hour. Escalating.

name: [Security] Authorization Failure Spike
message:
## Authorization Failure Spike

**Alert 2** — Chapter 2.10.6

10 or more authorization failures from the same user in the last 5 minutes.

**User ID:** {{@userId.name}}
**Count:** {{value}} failures

### Immediate Actions
1. Review the failures: [Log Explorer](https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%40event%3Aauthz.failure%20%40userId%3A{{@userId.name}})
2. Check what resources the user was attempting to access
3. Review whether the user's role or permissions have changed recently
4. Consider temporarily suspending the account if activity looks malicious

{{#is_alert}}@{{ALERT_EMAIL}}{{/is_alert}}

name: [Security] Security Event Detected
message:
## Security Event Logged

**Alert 3** — Chapter 2.10.6

A security event has been logged. Requires immediate review.

**Count:** {{value}} event(s)

### Immediate Actions
1. Review the events: [Log Explorer](https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%40event%3Asecurity.event)
2. Identify the event type and affected user/IP
3. Escalate to on-call if the event indicates active compromise

{{#is_alert}}@{{ALERT_EMAIL}}{{/is_alert}}

name: [Security] Privilege Change Detected
message:
## Privilege Change Detected

A user's role or permissions have been changed.

**Count:** {{value}} change(s)

### Immediate Actions
1. Review the change: [Log Explorer](https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%40event%3Aauthz.privilege.change)
2. Verify the change was authorized
3. If unexpected, revert the change and investigate

{{#is_alert}}@{{ALERT_EMAIL}}{{/is_alert}}
